CVE-2021-43518.title: Teeworlds up to and including 0.7.5 is vulnerable to Buffer Overf ...
CVE-2021-43518.description: Teeworlds up to and including 0.7.5 is vulnerable to Buffer Overflow. A map parser does not validate m_Channels value coming from a map file, leading to a buffer overflow. A malicious server may offer a specially crafted map that will overwrite client's stack causing denial of service or code execution.

CVE-2023-31517.title: A memory leak in the component CConsole::Chain of Teeworlds v0.7. ...
CVE-2023-31517.description: A memory leak in the component CConsole::Chain of Teeworlds v0.7.5 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via opening a crafted file.

CVE-2023-31518.title: A heap use-after-free in the component CDataFileReader::GetItem o ...
CVE-2023-31518.description: A heap use-after-free in the component CDataFileReader::GetItem of teeworlds v0.7.5 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted map file.
